metadata.description: AltTab's curated Claude Code plugins marketplace

plugins.name: tab
plugins.description: Tab, a thinking partner defined entirely in markdown. No compiled code, no dependencies — just text files that shape how Claude talks, thinks, and works with you.

plugins.name: tab-for-projects
plugins.description: Project workflow tracking — skills and agents for the Tab for Projects MCP. Conversational project management that captures decisions and context.
